method: iPhone Mirroring public UI observation via Mac

execution.screenshot_limitation: screencapture returned 'could not create image from display'; Computer Use screenshots were observable but not persisted to local files
execution.device_runtime_limitation: iPhone Mirroring displayed system alerts that Mac cannot use iPhone camera/microphone, so real camera preview changes and haptics were not validated

page_structure.top: Compact status row with mode tabs and small utility icons
page_structure.viewfinder: Dark viewfinder with grid, compact histogram/exposure reference, and low-profile lens/focal-length chips
page_structure.bottom: Centered shutter button, left preview/material entry, right latest thumbnail, parameter strip above shutter

parameters.white_balance: Horizontal low-profile scale with floating Kelvin value and right-side Auto toggle
parameters.iso: Horizontal scale with floating numeric value and right-side Auto toggle
parameters.shutter: Horizontal scale with floating shutter value and right-side Auto toggle
parameters.ev: Large arc/radial dial around lower-right shutter area with floating EV value
parameters.tint: No independent TINT entry observed in the public shooting page during this pass

state_expression.auto: Right-side capsule switch; highlighted when enabled, grey when disabled
state_expression.reset: Not clearly observed as a main parameter control
state_expression.lock: Not clearly observed in this pass
state_expression.active: Active parameter uses icon highlight/glow and focused control overlay

motion_and_haptics.visual_motion: Parameter controls replace/expand in place at the bottom without page navigation

seller_camera_recommendations: Add a stronger active value anchor or floating value badge to the existing five-column short vertical dial panel.
Keep Seller Camera's five-parameter simultaneous visibility instead of switching wholesale to one horizontal ruler.
Unify AUTO / RESET / LOCK visual states so they are not just text labels.
Refine active parameter glow/highlight without increasing panel size.
Keep future exposure/color assistance small, non-blocking, and viewfinder-first.
do_not_copy: Do not directly copy icons, brand elements, or the large EV radial dial.
Do not turn Seller Camera into a video-first dense pro camera UI.
Do not replace the five-column control console with full horizontal controls unless a later product decision explicitly changes direction.
next_package_suggestion: Current-value anchor and AUTO/RESET/LOCK visual state polish for Seller Camera's existing EV/WB/TINT/ISO/S console.
